use_cases: Displaying status labels and categories in dashboards and admin panels
Showing counts or metadata tags on cards and list items
Highlighting notification counts or feature flags in UI
Tagging content with labels in content management systems
Indicating user roles or permissions in settings interfaces
ai_summary: A lightweight, versatile badge component with multiple style variants including default, secondary, destructive, and outline. Built with class-variance-authority for flexible theming, featuring hover state transitions and keyboard focus accessibility rings. This atomic component serves as a foundational UI element for displaying labels, status indicators, and categorical information across various interface contexts.
